theme: chart the cheapest route through a derivative mountain range
title: Derivative Mountain Range: Cross-Country Jacobian Accumulation
innovation_hook: Optimal Jacobian accumulation is not a mode choice but a graph-cut discovery problem; planted bottlenecks make mixed elimination dominant.
strategies: trivial: forward mode (topological vertex elimination) = checker baseline
greedy: mode selection = cheaper of pure forward / pure reverse mode
strong: cross-country divide-at-narrowest-cut (pre-accumulate around each waist)
invalid: sequence that is not the intermediate-vertex set
